CustomField.description: Should EOLA,MR,rent be billed for a partial period, the pro-rata number days can be calculated based on actual number of days in the month/year, or fixed 30/360.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Should EOLA,MR,rent be billed for a partial period, the pro-rata number days can be calculated based on actual number of days in the month/year, or fixed 30/360.
CustomField.label: pro_rata_type
